lines.gurmukhi: ਧੋਹੁ ਨ ਚਲੀ ਖਸਮ ਨਾਲਿ ਲਬਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਗੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhohu na chalee khasam naal lab mohi vigute |
lines.english: Deception does not work with our Lord and Master; through their greed and emotional attachment, people are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam dhan keetaa poore gur parasaad |2|
lines.english: Nanak has made the Lord's Name his wealth, by the Grace of the Perfect Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨਿ ਭਵਾਈਅਨਿ ਜਮ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਮੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir joon bhavaaeean jam maarag mute |
lines.english: Time and time again, they are consigned to reincarnation, and abandoned on the path of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਬ ਕਰਨਿ ਭਲੇਰਿਆ ਮਦਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: karatab karan bhaleriaa mad maaeaa sute |
lines.english: They do their evil deeds, and sleep in the intoxication of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਦੁਖ ਸੇਤੀ ਜੁਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa paaein aapanaa dukh setee jute |
lines.english: They receive the consequences of their own actions, and are yoked to their pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਇ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਐ ਸਭ ਮੰਦੀ ਰੁਤੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naae visaariai sabh mandee rute |12|
lines.english: O Nanak, if one forgets the Name, all the seasons are evil. ||12||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਲਾਹਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaahiai man tan seetal hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, praising the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind and body are cooled and soothed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਠੰਦਿਆ ਬਹੰਦਿਆ ਸਵੰਦਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: autthandiaa bahandiaa savandiaa sukh soe |
lines.english: While standing up, sitting down and sleeping, be at peace;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis gur bhettai naanakaa tis man vasiaa soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord abides within the mind of one who meets with the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚਿ ਅਟਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਫਿਰੈ ਸੁਆਰਥੁ ਕਰੇ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: laalach attiaa nit firai suaarath kare na koe |
lines.english: Filled with greed, he constantly wanders around; he does not do any good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਵਸਤੂ ਕਉੜੀਆ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਉ ਮਿਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe vasatoo kaurreea sache naau mitthaa |
lines.english: All material things are bitter; the True Name alone is sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਜਨਾਂ ਚਖਿ ਸਾਧੀ ਡਿਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: saad aaeaa tin har janaan chakh saadhee dditthaa |
lines.english: Those humble servants of the Lord who taste it, come to savor its flavor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਜੋੜਿ ਕਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਤੁਠਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: har naanak mangai jorr kar prabh devai tutthaa |13|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the Lord's Name, with his palms pressed together; by His Pleasure, God has granted it. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਵੁਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jis likhiaa man tisai vutthaa |
lines.english: It comes to dwell within the mind of those who are so pre-destined by the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਦੁਯਾ ਕੁਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik niranjan rav rahiaa bhaau duyaa kutthaa |
lines.english: The One Immaculate Lord is pervading everywhere; He destroys the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਲੑੀ ਬਿਆ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਧਣੀ ਵਿਹੂਣੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gaalaee biaa vikaar naanak dhanee vihooneea |1|
lines.english: Other talk is corrupt, O Nanak, except that of the Lord Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਚੜੀ ਸਾ ਸਾਰੁ ਜੋ ਜਾਚੰਦੀ ਹੇਕੜੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaacharree saa saar jo jaachandee hekarro |
lines.english: The most excellent begging is begging for the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਹਿ ਜਿ ਵਿਧਾ ਮੰਨੁ ਪਛਾਣੂ ਵਿਰਲੋ ਥਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: neehi ji vidhaa man pachhaanoo viralo thio |
lines.english: One who recognizes the Lord is very rare; his mind is pierced through with the Love of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋੜਣਹਾਰਾ ਸੰਤੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਪਧਰੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jorranahaaraa sant naanak paadhar padharo |2|
lines.english: Such a Saint is the Uniter, O Nanak - he straightens out the path. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: soee sevihu jeearre daataa bakhasind |
lines.english: Serve Him, O my soul, who is the Giver and the Forgiver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਸਭਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ਹੋਨਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh sabh binaas hon simarat govind |
lines.english: All sinful mistakes are erased, by meditating in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਦਸਿਆ ਜਪੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: har maarag saadhoo dasiaa japeeai guramant |
lines.english: The Holy Saint has shown me the Way to the Lord; I chant the GurMantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਆਦ ਸਭਿ ਫਿਕਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa suaad sabh fikiaa har man bhaavand |
lines.english: The taste of Maya is totally bland and insipid; the Lord alone is pleasing to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਦਿਤੀ ਜਿੰਦੁ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: dhiaae naanak paramesarai jin ditee jind |14|
lines.english: Meditate, O Nanak, on the Transcendent Lord, who has blessed you with your soul and your life. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਤ ਲਗੀ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਜੋ ਬੀਜੇ ਸੋ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vat lagee sache naam kee jo beeje so khaae |
lines.english: The time has come to plant the seed of the Lord's Name; one who plants it, shall eat its fruit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat naanakaa jis no likhiaa aae |1|
lines.english: He alone receives it, O Nanak, whose destiny is so pre-ordained. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਣਾ ਤ ਸਚੁ ਇਕੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੁਸਿ ਦੇਵੈ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: manganaa ta sach ik jis tus devai aap |
lines.english: If one begs, then he should beg for the Name of the True One, which is given only by His Pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਦਾਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jit khaadhai man tripateeai naanak saahib daat |2|
lines.english: Eating this gift from the Lord and Master, O Nanak, the mind is satisfied. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੇ ਖਟਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa jag meh se khatteh jin har dhan raas |
lines.english: They alone earn profit in this world, who have the wealth of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤੀਆ ਭਾਉ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਸਚੇ ਦੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: duteea bhaau na jaananee sache dee aas |
lines.english: They do not know the love of duality; they place their hopes in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਸਰੇਵਿਆ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਭ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal ek sareviaa hor sabh vinaas |
lines.english: They serve the One Eternal Lord, and give up everything else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਜਨ ਰਖਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਸੁ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: kantth laae jan rakhiaa naanak bal jaas |15|
lines.english: God draws His humble servant close in His loving embrace and protects him - Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jis visarai tis birathaa saas |
lines.english: One who forgets the Supreme Lord God - useless is his breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਮੀ ਰਜੀ ਤਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: an dhan bahut upajiaa prithamee rajee tipat aghaae |
lines.english: Grain and wealth were produced in abundance; the earth was totally satisfied and satiated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ਮੀਹੁ ਵੁਠਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham furamaaeaa meehu vutthaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God gave the Order, and the rain automatically began to fall.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਗਇਆ ਬਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa gun ucharai dukh daalad geaa bilaae |
lines.english: Forever and ever, chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and pain and poverty shall run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa paaeaa miliaa tisai rajaae |
lines.english: People obtain that which they are pre-ordained to receive, according to the Will of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਲਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੈ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paramesar jeevaaliaa naanak tisai dhiaae |1|
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord keeps you alive; O Nanak, meditate on Him. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:
